requirement_description: The system SHALL support Visa Mastercard AMEX and Maestro card schemes
test_steps: POST /api/chat/stream with project_id of a project that has srs_payment_module.docx indexed in M1; message: Which card schemes does PayFlow support?
assertions: response mentions: Visa, Mastercard, AMEX, Maestro; rag_sources includes srs_payment_module.docx

requirement_description: The system SHALL support Visa Mastercard AMEX and Maestro card schemes
assertions: glossary contains term Transaction or Authorization; at least one node label contains: Transaction, Payment, Card or Scheme

requirement_description: The system SHALL support Visa Mastercard AMEX and Maestro card schemes
test_steps: POST /api/chat/stream; message: Does PayFlow support UnionPay or Diners Club?
assertions: response does NOT confidently confirm support; response references only the 4 schemes from FR-002

requirement_description: The system SHALL capture authorised transactions within the capture window (default 7 days configurable per merchant)
test_steps: POST /api/chat/stream; message: What is the default capture window for transactions?

requirement_description: The system SHALL capture authorised transactions within the capture window (default 7 days configurable per merchant)
test_steps: POST /api/chat/stream; message: Can the capture window be configured per merchant?
assertions: response confirms configurability (contains: configurable, per merchant or merchant-specific); rag_sources not empty

requirement_description: The system SHALL capture authorised transactions within the capture window (default 7 days configurable per merchant)
test_steps: call context_builder.build_with_sources(project_id, query=capture window transaction); unpack (context_text, sources)
assertions: 7 in context_text or capture window in context_text; len(sources) > 0
